name: coretrek/banner-text
title: Banner Text Collections
description: Split-screen sticky-image banner with an interactive, scrollable collection list.

default.name: VERA BLOOM
default.description1: The Fleur Décor Spring Collection is inspired by the gentle awakening of nature — where florals bloom freely, light softens, and every detail feels full of possibility.
default.description2: Designed for couples drawn to elegance with a natural softness, this collection embraces fresh palettes, delicate textures, and floral abundance. It is a celebration of new beginnings, curated with intention and refined artistry.

default.name: SOLERA
default.description1: The Solera Collection captures the warmth and vibrancy of summer — where golden light dances, colors deepen, and every moment feels alive with energy.
default.description2: Perfect for couples seeking bold elegance with a sun-kissed glow, this collection features rich tones, lush textures, and statement florals. It is a celebration of passion and joy, designed with artistry and intention.

default.name: EMBER AND OAK
default.description1: The Ember and Oak Collection embodies the richness of autumn — where leaves turn golden, warmth deepens, and every detail feels grounded in nature's embrace.
default.description2: Crafted for couples drawn to rustic elegance and earthy sophistication, this collection features warm palettes, organic textures, and abundant seasonal florals. It is a celebration of harvest and gratitude, designed with timeless artistry.

default.name: NOCTURNE IVORY
default.description1: The Nocturne Ivory Collection reflects the elegance of winter — where frost glistens, candlelight glows, and every detail feels refined and intimate.
default.description2: Designed for couples seeking timeless sophistication with a touch of magic, this collection features soft ivory tones, luxurious textures, and delicate winter florals. It is a celebration of romance and serenity, curated with exquisite artistry.
